warmup:
Welcome the children and tell them you’re the English
Teacher (BeTeacher) and you are very happy to teach
them this year, but don’t tell them your name yet!
In order to introduce yourself, play True or False with
them: tell them 5 facts about yourself, including your
name/nickname and a fun fact; 3 true and two false
facts. The students are expected to guess if each fact is
true or false. Then, have them introduce themselves
by completing the following sentences:
- My name’s/I’m…
- I’m X years old / I’m X.
- I like…
- I don’t like…

Play Hot Potato. See the Games section. Use the ball
and the BeDice (show the kids the ball and the
BeDice).
Explain that, when they hear “Stop!”, the one who is
holding the ball is supposed to roll the BeDice and,
depending on which number they get from the dice,
say:
- Numbers 1 or 4: a color;
- Numbers 2 or 5: 2 toys;
- Numbers 3 or 6: 3 family members.
development:
Present the material to the children and remind them
of the days you’ll be together in class. Tell them that in
order for the classes to work and everybody have fun,
you will make some deals together. Ask them what
they think should be important to agree on.
Brainstorm and discuss their ideias. Attention: they’ll
probably share their ideas in their mother tongue so, when brainstorming, apply the Instant Translation
technique and change them to English.
*Suggestions of deals: attend the classes and be
punctual, speak only English, listen to the teacher, do
the activities and the homework, play the games and
have fun
closure:
Have the children stand up and sing the See You Later,
Alligator song. Encourage singing and dancing from all
of them.
U1W1C1.prompt:
=== CONTEXTO ESPECÍFICO DESTA AULA (U1W1C1 - Content Class) ===

OBJETIVOS: To welcome and get to know the
students;
To make classroom deals
VOCABULÁRIO: ● Colors;
● Toys;
● Family members
GRAMÁTICA: ● My name’s / I’m… ;
● I’m X years old / I’m X;
● I like…;
● I don’t like…;

PASSO A PASSO PARA O KEVIN CONDUZIR (Aguarde a resposta do Teacher ou da turma antes de pular de um passo para outro):

[ FASE 1: WARM UP ]
- Ação 1: Welcome the children and tell them you’re the English
Teacher (BeTeacher) and you are very happy to teach
them this year, but don’t tell them your name yet!
In order to introduce yourself, play True or False with
them: tell them 5 facts about yourself, including your
name/nickname and a fun fact; 3 true and two false
facts. The students are expected to guess if each fact is
true or false. Then, have them introduce themselves
by completing the following sentences:
- My name’s/I’m…
- I’m X years old / I’m X.
- I like…
- I don’t like…
- Ação 2: Play Hot Potato. See the Games section. Use the ball
and the BeDice (show the kids the ball and the
BeDice).
Explain that, when they hear “Stop!”, the one who is
holding the ball is supposed to roll the BeDice and,
depending on which number they get from the dice,
say:
- Numbers 1 or 4: a color;
- Numbers 2 or 5: 2 toys;
- Numbers 3 or 6: 3 family members.

[ FASE 2: DEVELOPMENT ]
- Ação 1: Present the material to the children and remind them
of the days you’ll be together in class. Tell them that in
order for the classes to work and everybody have fun,
you will make some deals together. Ask them what
they think should be important to agree on.
Brainstorm and discuss their ideias. Attention: they’ll
probably share their ideas in their mother tongue so, when brainstorming, apply the Instant Translation
technique and change them to English.
*Suggestions of deals: attend the classes and be
punctual, speak only English, listen to the teacher, do
the activities and the homework, play the games and
have fun

[ FASE 3: CLOSURE ]
- Ação 1: Have the children stand up and sing the See You Later,
Alligator song. Encourage singing and dancing from all
of them.
